evals.prompt: I just refactored the login form in src/features/auth/login-form.tsx and now the CI E2E tests are failing. Can you figure out which tests are affected, update them, and tell me the safest command to run first?
evals.expected_output: Discovers the E2E runner, maps login-form.tsx to affected auth specs, updates or extends the matching test files, and simulates the narrowest verification command before suggesting broader runs.

evals.prompt: We added a new checkout flow in src/features/billing/checkout/ but I don't think we have any E2E coverage for it yet. Can you check what exists and add the missing tests?
evals.expected_output: Discovers existing E2E specs, identifies the checkout flow as a coverage gap, adds or extends specs to cover the new happy path and a high-risk branch, then simulates the targeted verification command.

evals.prompt: I made changes across a few files in our monorepo's apps/web directory. I want to run only the E2E tests that might be affected instead of the whole suite. Can you find the right ones?
evals.expected_output: Detects the nested E2E runner under apps/web, maps changed files to affected specs within that subtree, respects the working directory for command paths, and produces a scoped targeted command.
